Module 1:
Warming Your Cold List
!
Executive Summary
• 	Almost EVERYONE has let a list go cold (by not publishing to it)
• 	For every week or month a list goes unmailed, it gets colder and colder
• 	Fortunately, there is an easy solution…
!
How to Warm Your Cold List
• 	The “mea culpa”...reintroduce yourself and tell them why you haven’t
contacted them. It doesn’t even have to be a great reason, just give them
one!
• 	Some “revelation of self ” type situation might work well
• 	Send them two or three pieces of cool content
• 	You could then ask them to opt-in for some cool bonus content
• 	Make sure they opt in to a new list, and then you’ll know who’s re-
engaged
• 	That’s it... it’s that simple
!
